---
title: ""
runtime: shiny
toc: false
---

```{r}
#| include: false
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)

library(sf)
library(leaflet)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# ── Safe data loader ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# Tries the real RDS; falls back to synthetic demo data so the
# page always renders even when the file is absent.
rds_path <- "../data/tanzania/hf_demographic_sf.rds"

if (file.exists(rds_path)) {

  hf_sf <- readRDS(rds_path)

} else {

  message("Demo data: real RDS not found at ", rds_path)

  set.seed(42)
  n <- 300

  # Random points roughly inside Tanzania
  lon <- runif(n, 29.5, 40.5)
  lat <- runif(n, -11.7, -1.0)

  hf_sf <- data.frame(
    name          = paste("Facility", seq_len(n)),
    facility_type = sample(c("Dispensary","Health Centre",
                             "District Hospital","Regional Hospital",
                             "Other"), n, replace = TRUE,
                           prob = c(.50, .25, .12, .08, .05)),
    ownership     = sample(c("Government","Faith-Based",
                             "Private for Profit","NGO"),
                           n, replace = TRUE,
                           prob = c(.60, .18, .15, .07)),
    admin1        = sample(paste("Region", LETTERS[1:8]), n, replace = TRUE),
    admin2        = sample(paste("District", 1:20),       n, replace = TRUE),
    longitude     = lon,
    latitude      = lat
  ) |>
    st_as_sf(coords = c("longitude","latitude"), crs = 4326, remove = FALSE)
}
```

```{=html}
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
     HERO BANNER
════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="tz-hero">
  <img src="../images/banner3.png" class="tz-hero-img" alt="Tanzania banner"/>
  <div class="tz-hero-overlay">
    <div class="tz-hero-content">
      <h1 class="tz-hero-title">
        Tanzania
        <img src="../images/flags/tz_flag.png" alt="Tanzania flag" class="tz-flag"/>
      </h1>
      <p class="tz-hero-sub">Geocoded Health Facilities for Malaria Modelling</p>
      <p class="tz-hero-desc">Standardised, geolocated facility information to strengthen modelling, planning, and decision-making</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
     QUICK-STATS BAR
════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="tz-stats-bar">
  <div class="tz-stat">
    <span class="tz-stat-value">7 560</span>
    <span class="tz-stat-label">Total Facilities</span>
  </div>
  <div class="tz-stat-divider"></div>
  <div class="tz-stat">
    <span class="tz-stat-value">86 %</span>
    <span class="tz-stat-label">GPS Coordinates</span>
  </div>
  <div class="tz-stat-divider"></div>
  <div class="tz-stat">
    <span class="tz-stat-value">26</span>
    <span class="tz-stat-label">Regions</span>
  </div>
  <div class="tz-stat-divider"></div>
  <div class="tz-stat">
    <span class="tz-stat-value">2015–2024</span>
    <span class="tz-stat-label">Temporal Coverage</span>
  </div>
  <div class="tz-stat-divider"></div>
  <div class="tz-stat">
    <span class="tz-stat-value">v1.2</span>
    <span class="tz-stat-label">Dataset Version</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
     SECTION NAV PILLS
════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="tz-section-nav">
  <a href="#overview"     class="tz-nav-pill active">📋 Overview</a>
  <a href="#map"          class="tz-nav-pill">🗺️ Map</a>
  <a href="#demographics" class="tz-nav-pill">👥 Demographics</a>
  <a href="#services"     class="tz-nav-pill">🏥 Services</a>
  <a href="#quality"      class="tz-nav-pill">✅ Data Quality</a>
  <a href="#download"     class="tz-nav-pill">⬇️ Download</a>
</div>
```

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
     OVERVIEW
════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

```{=html}
<section class="tz-section" id="overview">
  <div class="tz-section-inner">
    <div class="tz-section-header">
      <span class="tz-section-badge">Overview</span>
      <h2>Tanzania Health Facility Landscape</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="tz-overview-grid">
      <div class="tz-overview-text">
        <p>
          Tanzania operates a tiered health system — from national and regional referral
          hospitals down to dispensaries and community health posts — overseen by the
          Ministry of Health, Community Development, Gender, Elderly and Children
          (MoHCDGEC).
        </p>
        <p>
          This dataset aggregates facility records from the national master facility list
          and annual DHIS2 organisation unit exports, covering all 26 regions of mainland
          Tanzania and Zanzibar. Records are harmonised to the HF Portal common schema
          and validated against GADM v4.1 administrative boundaries.
        </p>
        <p>
          Coordinate coverage stands at <strong>86 %</strong>. Facilities without GPS
          points are assigned the centroid of their lowest available administrative unit
          and flagged via <code>coord_source = "Centroid"</code>.
        </p>
      </div>
      <div class="tz-overview-cards">
        <div class="tz-info-card">
          <div class="tz-info-icon">🏛️</div>
          <div class="tz-info-body">
            <div class="tz-info-label">Primary source</div>
            <div class="tz-info-value">MoHCDGEC / DHIS2</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="tz-info-card">
          <div class="tz-info-icon">📐</div>
          <div class="tz-info-body">
            <div class="tz-info-label">Coordinate system</div>
            <div class="tz-info-value">WGS84 (EPSG:4326)</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="tz-info-card">
          <div class="tz-info-icon">🔄</div>
          <div class="tz-info-body">
            <div class="tz-info-label">Update frequency</div>
            <div class="tz-info-value">Annual (Oct each year)</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="tz-info-card">
          <div class="tz-info-icon">📜</div>
          <div class="tz-info-body">
            <div class="tz-info-label">Licence</div>
            <div class="tz-info-value">CC BY 4.0</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
     MAP
════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

```{=html}
<section class="tz-section tz-section-alt" id="map">
  <div class="tz-section-inner">
    <div class="tz-section-header">
      <span class="tz-section-badge">Interactive Map</span>
      <h2>Health Facilities Map</h2>
      <p class="tz-section-desc">Click any marker for facility details. Use the layer control to filter by facility type or ownership.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="tz-map-wrap">
```

```{r}
#| out.height: "520px"
pal <- colorFactor(
  palette = c("#3d7a6e","#bf5b38","#4a7ab5","#6b7fa0","#2a9d5c"),
  domain  = hf_sf$facility_type
)

leaflet(hf_sf) |>
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron,
                   options = tileOptions(minZoom = 5)) |>
  addCircleMarkers(
    radius      = 4,
    stroke      = TRUE,
    color       = "#fff",
    weight      = 0.8,
    fillColor   = ~pal(facility_type),
    fillOpacity = 0.82,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<div style='font-family:Inter,sans-serif;min-width:180px'>",
      "<strong style='color:#162033'>", name, "</strong><br>",
      "<span style='color:#5a6a7e'>", facility_type, "</span><br>",
      "<hr style='margin:6px 0;border-color:#d8e3ec'>",
      "Ownership: <b>", ownership, "</b><br>",
      "Region: ", admin1, " › ", admin2,
      "</div>"
    )
  ) |>
  addLegend(
    pal      = pal,
    values   = ~facility_type,
    title    = "Facility Type",
    position = "bottomright",
    opacity  = 0.9
  ) |>
  setView(lng = 34.9, lat = -6.4, zoom = 6)
```

```{=html}
    </div><!-- /.tz-map-wrap -->
  </div>
</section>
```

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
     DEMOGRAPHICS
════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

```{=html}
<section class="tz-section" id="demographics">
  <div class="tz-section-inner">
    <div class="tz-section-header">
      <span class="tz-section-badge">Demographics</span>
      <h2>Facility Composition</h2>
      <p class="tz-section-desc">Breakdown of facilities by type and ownership across Tanzania.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="tz-chart-grid">
      <div class="tz-chart-card">
        <h3 class="tz-chart-title">By Facility Type</h3>
```

```{r}
#| fig.height: 3.8
type_df <- hf_sf |>
  st_drop_geometry() |>
  dplyr::count(facility_type, name = "n") |>
  dplyr::arrange(desc(n)) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    facility_type = factor(facility_type, levels = facility_type)
  )

ggplot(type_df, aes(x = facility_type, y = n, fill = facility_type)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.65, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(aes(label = formatC(n, format = "d", big.mark = ",")),
            hjust = -0.15, size = 3.2, colour = "#1a2033") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = setNames(
      rep(c("#3d7a6e","#bf5b38","#4a7ab5","#6b7fa0","#2a9d5c"),
          length.out = nrow(type_df)),
      levels(type_df$facility_type)
    )
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.22))) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Number of facilities") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y        = element_text(colour = "#1a2033"),
    axis.text.x        = element_text(colour = "#5a6a7e"),
    plot.background    = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA)
  )
```

```{=html}
      </div><!-- /.tz-chart-card -->
      <div class="tz-chart-card">
        <h3 class="tz-chart-title">By Ownership</h3>
```

```{r}
#| fig.height: 3.8
own_df <- hf_sf |>
  st_drop_geometry() |>
  dplyr::count(ownership, name = "n") |>
  dplyr::arrange(desc(n)) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    pct       = round(n / sum(n) * 100, 1),
    ownership = factor(ownership, levels = ownership)
  )

pal_own <- c("#3d7a6e","#bf5b38","#4a7ab5","#6b7fa0","#2a9d5c",
             "#e8a838","#7b5ea7")

ggplot(own_df, aes(x = "", y = n, fill = ownership)) +
  geom_col(width = 1, colour = "white", linewidth = 0.8) +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = setNames(pal_own[seq_len(nrow(own_df))], levels(own_df$ownership))
  ) +
  labs(fill = NULL) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.text     = element_text(size = 9, colour = "#1a2033"),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA)
  )
```

```{=html}
      </div><!-- /.tz-chart-card -->
    </div><!-- /.tz-chart-grid -->

    <!-- Summary table -->
    <div class="tz-table-wrap">
      <h3 class="tz-chart-title" style="margin-bottom:1rem">Facility Count by Type &amp; Ownership</h3>
```

```{r}
hf_sf |>
  st_drop_geometry() |>
  dplyr::count(facility_type, ownership) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from   = ownership,
    values_from  = n,
    values_fill  = 0
  ) |>
  dplyr::rename(Type = facility_type) |>
  knitr::kable(
    format     = "html",
    table.attr = 'class="table table-sm table-hover tz-table"'
  )
```

```{=html}
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
     SERVICES
════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

```{=html}
<section class="tz-section tz-section-alt" id="services">
  <div class="tz-section-inner">
    <div class="tz-section-header">
      <span class="tz-section-badge">Services</span>
      <h2>Available Health Services</h2>
      <p class="tz-section-desc">Service availability across facility levels as captured in the dataset.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="tz-service-grid">
      <div class="tz-service-card">
        <div class="tz-service-icon">🦟</div>
        <h4>Malaria Services</h4>
        <p>Outpatient diagnosis, rapid diagnostic tests (RDTs), artemisinin-based combination therapy (ACT), and inpatient malaria management.</p>
        <div class="tz-service-tag">Available at Health Centres &amp; above</div>
      </div>
      <div class="tz-service-card">
        <div class="tz-service-icon">🤱</div>
        <h4>Maternal Health</h4>
        <p>Antenatal care (ANC), skilled birth attendance, postnatal care, and emergency obstetric services at district and above.</p>
        <div class="tz-service-tag">Available at Health Centres &amp; above</div>
      </div>
      <div class="tz-service-card">
        <div class="tz-service-icon">💉</div>
        <h4>Immunisation</h4>
        <p>Routine EPI services including measles, DPT, polio, and seasonal malaria chemoprevention (SMC) where applicable.</p>
        <div class="tz-service-tag">Available at Dispensaries &amp; above</div>
      </div>
      <div class="tz-service-card">
        <div class="tz-service-icon">🔬</div>
        <h4>Laboratory</h4>
        <p>Basic diagnostics at lower levels; full laboratory capacity (blood counts, culture, parasitology) at district hospitals and above.</p>
        <div class="tz-service-tag">Full capacity at Hospitals</div>
      </div>
      <div class="tz-service-card">
        <div class="tz-service-icon">🩺</div>
        <h4>HIV / TB Services</h4>
        <p>HIV testing, counselling, ART initiation and follow-up, TB diagnosis and DOTS at PEPFAR-supported facilities and higher levels.</p>
        <div class="tz-service-tag">Selected facilities</div>
      </div>
      <div class="tz-service-card">
        <div class="tz-service-icon">🚑</div>
        <h4>Emergency Care</h4>
        <p>Emergency triage and basic resuscitation at health centres; comprehensive emergency and surgical care at district hospitals.</p>
        <div class="tz-service-tag">District Hospitals &amp; above</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="tz-callout">
      <span class="tz-callout-icon">ℹ️</span>
      <span>Service availability in this dataset is derived from SARA survey rounds and DHIS2 service indicators. Coverage may not reflect real-time facility status. Consult the quality report for survey dates.</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
     DATA QUALITY
════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

```{=html}
<section class="tz-section" id="quality">
  <div class="tz-section-inner">
    <div class="tz-section-header">
      <span class="tz-section-badge">Data Quality</span>
      <h2>Quality Assessment — v1.2</h2>
      <p class="tz-section-desc">Standardised quality scores across five dimensions. Full report included in the download bundle.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="tz-quality-grid">
      <div class="tz-quality-card">
        <div class="tz-quality-header">
          <span class="tz-quality-icon">📍</span>
          <span class="tz-quality-label">Coordinate Validity</span>
        </div>
        <div class="tz-quality-bar-wrap">
          <div class="tz-quality-bar" style="width:86%"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="tz-quality-score">86 / 100</div>
        <div class="tz-quality-note">86 % of facilities have valid GPS points within Tanzania's boundary</div>
      </div>

      <div class="tz-quality-card">
        <div class="tz-quality-header">
          <span class="tz-quality-icon">🗂️</span>
          <span class="tz-quality-label">Attribute Completeness</span>
        </div>
        <div class="tz-quality-bar-wrap">
          <div class="tz-quality-bar" style="width:78%"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="tz-quality-score">78 / 100</div>
        <div class="tz-quality-note">Mean non-missing rate across all schema fields</div>
      </div>

      <div class="tz-quality-card">
        <div class="tz-quality-header">
          <span class="tz-quality-icon">🔁</span>
          <span class="tz-quality-label">Duplicate Rate</span>
        </div>
        <div class="tz-quality-bar-wrap">
          <div class="tz-quality-bar" style="width:99.5%; background:#2a9d5c"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="tz-quality-score">&lt; 0.5 %</div>
        <div class="tz-quality-note">Post-deduplication residual duplicate rate</div>
      </div>

      <div class="tz-quality-card">
        <div class="tz-quality-header">
          <span class="tz-quality-icon">🏛️</span>
          <span class="tz-quality-label">Admin Consistency</span>
        </div>
        <div class="tz-quality-bar-wrap">
          <div class="tz-quality-bar" style="width:94%"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="tz-quality-score">94 / 100</div>
        <div class="tz-quality-note">admin1–admin2 codes consistent with GADM v4.1</div>
      </div>

      <div class="tz-quality-card">
        <div class="tz-quality-header">
          <span class="tz-quality-icon">📅</span>
          <span class="tz-quality-label">Temporal Coverage</span>
        </div>
        <div class="tz-quality-bar-wrap">
          <div class="tz-quality-bar" style="width:90%"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="tz-quality-score">2015 – 2024</div>
        <div class="tz-quality-note">10-year longitudinal coverage with annual snapshots</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
     DATA DOWNLOAD
════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

```{=html}
<section class="tz-section tz-section-alt" id="download">
  <div class="tz-section-inner">
    <div class="tz-section-header">
      <span class="tz-section-badge">Download</span>
      <h2>Access the Dataset</h2>
      <p class="tz-section-desc">All files are hosted on Zenodo under CC BY 4.0. Please cite the DOI in any publication.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="tz-download-grid">
      <div class="tz-download-card">
        <div class="tz-dl-icon">📄</div>
        <div class="tz-dl-body">
          <div class="tz-dl-name">Facility List (CSV)</div>
          <div class="tz-dl-desc">Flat file, all 7 560 facilities with full schema fields</div>
        </div>
        <a href="../data/tanzania/hf_demographics.csv" class="tz-dl-btn">Download</a>
      </div>

      <div class="tz-download-card">
        <div class="tz-dl-icon">🌍</div>
        <div class="tz-dl-body">
          <div class="tz-dl-name">Spatial File (GeoPackage)</div>
          <div class="tz-dl-desc">GPKG format, ready for QGIS / R / Python spatial analysis</div>
        </div>
        <a href="../data/tanzania/hf_demographics.gpkg" class="tz-dl-btn">Download</a>
      </div>

      <div class="tz-download-card">
        <div class="tz-dl-icon">📦</div>
        <div class="tz-dl-body">
          <div class="tz-dl-name">R sf Object (RDS)</div>
          <div class="tz-dl-desc">Pre-processed sf object for direct use in R modelling pipelines</div>
        </div>
        <a href="../data/tanzania/hf_demographic_sf.rds" class="tz-dl-btn">Download</a>
      </div>

      <div class="tz-download-card">
        <div class="tz-dl-icon">📋</div>
        <div class="tz-dl-body">
          <div class="tz-dl-name">Quality Report (PDF)</div>
          <div class="tz-dl-desc">Full quality assessment including field-level completeness scores</div>
        </div>
        <a href="#" class="tz-dl-btn tz-dl-btn-muted">Coming soon</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="tz-cite-box">
      <div class="tz-cite-label">📖 How to cite</div>
      <code class="tz-cite-text">
        HF Data Portal Team (2024). Tanzania Health Facility Dataset v1.2.
        Zenodo. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.XXXXXX
      </code>
    </div>

    <div class="tz-code-toggle">
      <h3 class="tz-chart-title">Load in R</h3>
```

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
# Option 1: Load the pre-processed sf object
hf_tz <- readRDS("data/tanzania/hf_demographic_sf.rds")

# Option 2: Read CSV and convert to sf
library(readr)
library(sf)
hf_tz <- read_csv("data/tanzania/hf_demographics.csv") |>
  filter(!is.na(longitude)) |>
  st_as_sf(coords = c("longitude", "latitude"), crs = 4326)

# Quick summary
cat("Facilities:", nrow(hf_tz), "\n")
cat("Regions:", n_distinct(hf_tz$admin1), "\n")
table(hf_tz$facility_type)
```

```{=html}
    </div><!-- /.tz-code-toggle -->
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Back link -->
<div style="padding: 2rem 2rem 3rem; background:#fff;">
  <a href="../index.html" class="btn-hf-primary">← All Countries</a>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<style>
/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
   Tanzania Page — Local Styles
   (uses global palette via CSS custom properties)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* ── Hero ─────────────────────────────────────── */
.tz-hero {
  position: relative;
  height: 320px;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.tz-hero-img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  object-position: center 40%;
  display: block;
}
.tz-hero-overlay {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(
    to right,
    rgba(22, 32, 51, 0.82) 0%,
    rgba(22, 32, 51, 0.5)  60%,
    rgba(22, 32, 51, 0.15) 100%
  );
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 0 5%;
}
.tz-hero-content { max-width: 560px; }
.tz-hero-title {
  font-size: 2.6rem;
  color: #fff;
  margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 14px;
}
.tz-flag { height: 36px; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); }
.tz-hero-sub {
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.88);
  margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
  font-weight: 600;
}
.tz-hero-desc {
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
  margin: 0;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

/* ── Stats bar ────────────────────────────────── */
.tz-stats-bar {
  background: var(--hf-navy);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0;
  padding: 0;
}
.tz-stat {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 18px 32px;
  color: #fff;
}
.tz-stat-value {
  font-size: 1.45rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #fff;
  line-height: 1;
}
.tz-stat-label {
  font-size: 0.74rem;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
  margin-top: 4px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
}
.tz-stat-divider {
  width: 1px;
  height: 36px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.18);
}

/* ── Section nav pills ────────────────────────── */
.tz-section-nav {
  background: var(--hf-bg-section);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--hf-border);
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 4px;
  padding: 10px 24px;
  position: sticky;
  top: 60px;
  z-index: 100;
}
.tz-nav-pill {
  padding: 6px 16px;
  border-radius: 50px;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--hf-text-muted);
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: all 0.18s ease;
  border: 1px solid transparent;
}
.tz-nav-pill:hover,
.tz-nav-pill.active {
  background: #fff;
  color: var(--hf-teal);
  border-color: var(--hf-border);
  text-decoration: none;
}

/* ── Section wrapper ──────────────────────────── */
.tz-section {
  background: #fff;
  padding: 60px 0;
}
.tz-section-alt { background: var(--hf-bg-section); }
.tz-section-inner {
  max-width: 1080px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 0 32px;
}

/* ── Section header ───────────────────────────── */
.tz-section-badge {
  display: inline-block;
  background: rgba(61,122,110,0.1);
  color: var(--hf-teal);
  border: 1px solid rgba(61,122,110,0.25);
  border-radius: 50px;
  padding: 3px 14px;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}
.tz-section-header {
  margin-bottom: 2.2rem;
}
.tz-section-header h2 {
  font-size: 1.7rem;
  color: var(--hf-navy);
  margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
}
.tz-section-desc {
  color: var(--hf-text-muted);
  font-size: 0.96rem;
  margin: 0;
  max-width: 600px;
}

/* ── Overview grid ────────────────────────────── */
.tz-overview-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 48px;
  align-items: start;
}
.tz-overview-text p {
  color: var(--hf-text-muted);
  line-height: 1.78;
  font-size: 0.96rem;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}
.tz-info-card {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 14px;
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid var(--hf-border);
  border-radius: var(--hf-radius-sm);
  padding: 14px 18px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
  box-shadow: var(--hf-shadow);
}
.tz-info-icon { font-size: 1.5rem; }
.tz-info-label { font-size: 0.76rem; color: var(--hf-text-muted); }
.tz-info-value { font-size: 0.94rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--hf-navy); }

/* ── Map ──────────────────────────────────────── */
.tz-map-wrap {
  border-radius: var(--hf-radius);
  overflow: hidden;
  box-shadow: var(--hf-shadow);
  border: 1px solid var(--hf-border);
}
.tz-map-wrap .leaflet-container { border-radius: var(--hf-radius); }

/* ── Charts grid ──────────────────────────────── */
.tz-chart-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 24px;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}
.tz-chart-card {
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid var(--hf-border);
  border-radius: var(--hf-radius);
  padding: 24px;
  box-shadow: var(--hf-shadow);
}
.tz-chart-title {
  font-size: 0.97rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--hf-navy);
  margin: 0 0 1rem;
  padding-bottom: 0.65rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--hf-border);
}
.tz-table-wrap {
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid var(--hf-border);
  border-radius: var(--hf-radius);
  padding: 24px;
  box-shadow: var(--hf-shadow);
  overflow-x: auto;
}
.tz-table { font-size: 0.88rem; }
.tz-table thead th { color: var(--hf-navy); border-bottom: 2px solid var(--hf-border); }

/* ── Services grid ────────────────────────────── */
.tz-service-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 20px;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}
.tz-service-card {
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid var(--hf-border);
  border-radius: var(--hf-radius);
  padding: 24px 20px;
  box-shadow: var(--hf-shadow);
  transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;
}
.tz-service-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-4px);
  box-shadow: var(--hf-shadow-hover);
}
.tz-service-icon { font-size: 2rem; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; display: block; }
.tz-service-card h4 {
  font-size: 0.97rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--hf-navy);
  margin: 0 0 0.6rem;
}
.tz-service-card p {
  font-size: 0.87rem;
  color: var(--hf-text-muted);
  line-height: 1.65;
  margin: 0 0 0.9rem;
}
.tz-service-tag {
  display: inline-block;
  background: rgba(61,122,110,0.09);
  color: var(--hf-teal);
  border-radius: 4px;
  padding: 3px 10px;
  font-size: 0.76rem;
  font-weight: 500;
}
.tz-callout {
  background: rgba(61,122,110,0.07);
  border: 1px solid rgba(61,122,110,0.22);
  border-radius: var(--hf-radius-sm);
  padding: 14px 18px;
  display: flex;
  gap: 12px;
  align-items: flex-start;
  font-size: 0.89rem;
  color: var(--hf-text-muted);
  line-height: 1.6;
}
.tz-callout-icon { font-size: 1.1rem; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 1px; }

/* ── Quality scores ───────────────────────────── */
.tz-quality-grid {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 16px;
}
.tz-quality-card {
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid var(--hf-border);
  border-radius: var(--hf-radius);
  padding: 20px 24px;
  box-shadow: var(--hf-shadow);
}
.tz-quality-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}
.tz-quality-icon { font-size: 1.2rem; }
.tz-quality-label { font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.96rem; color: var(--hf-navy); }
.tz-quality-bar-wrap {
  background: var(--hf-bg-section);
  border-radius: 50px;
  height: 10px;
  overflow: hidden;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.tz-quality-bar {
  height: 100%;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--hf-teal), #4a9080);
  border-radius: 50px;
  transition: width 1s ease;
}
.tz-quality-score {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--hf-teal);
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}
.tz-quality-note { font-size: 0.84rem; color: var(--hf-text-muted); }

/* ── Download cards ───────────────────────────── */
.tz-download-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 16px;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}
.tz-download-card {
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid var(--hf-border);
  border-radius: var(--hf-radius);
  padding: 20px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 16px;
  box-shadow: var(--hf-shadow);
}
.tz-dl-icon { font-size: 2rem; flex-shrink: 0; }
.tz-dl-body { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
.tz-dl-name { font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.94rem; color: var(--hf-navy); margin-bottom: 3px; }
.tz-dl-desc { font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--hf-text-muted); line-height: 1.45; }
.tz-dl-btn {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  background: var(--hf-teal);
  color: #fff !important;
  border-radius: var(--hf-radius-sm);
  padding: 8px 18px;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  transition: background 0.18s;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.tz-dl-btn:hover { background: #4a9080; }
.tz-dl-btn-muted { background: #aab8c4 !important; cursor: default; }
.tz-dl-btn-muted:hover { background: #aab8c4 !important; }

/* ── Citation box ─────────────────────────────── */
.tz-cite-box {
  background: var(--hf-navy);
  border-radius: var(--hf-radius);
  padding: 20px 24px;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}
.tz-cite-label {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65);
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.tz-cite-text {
  display: block;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.88);
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
  font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
  background: transparent;
  border: none;
  padding: 0;
}

.tz-code-toggle h3 { margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }

/* ── Responsive ───────────────────────────────── */
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .tz-service-grid   { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
  .tz-overview-grid  { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 24px; }
  .tz-download-grid  { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
}
@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .tz-hero           { height: 240px; }
  .tz-hero-title     { font-size: 1.9rem; }
  .tz-stat           { padding: 14px 18px; }
  .tz-stat-divider   { display: none; }
  .tz-chart-grid     { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .tz-service-grid   { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .tz-section-inner  { padding: 0 16px; }
}
</style>
```
